text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Kita! So today's the big day—it's your
birthday!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Teio, one more time! Say that again, just
one more time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That was my dream. I've always wanted you to
remember my birthday...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's like my dad said. You'll know you've made it
when your hero remembers you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Until they celebrate with you in some way, you're just another nobody. But today, you wished me a happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm... yeah, that's right. You've finally gained my
attention, so I remembered your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But you shouldn't stop here, got it? You've gotta
keep getting better and become my rival
someday.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes, absolutely! Teio... hearing that from you is
the greatest gift of all. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(Haha, I can't tell her that I've had it memorized
for a long time now. Geez, should I still give her
the karaoke mic I bought?)
